# tmp_autmog_pen_versions

Version history for meaningful Autmog pen changes.

## Columns

| Column | Type | Required | Key | Default | Relation | Description | Example |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `bigint` | yes | PK |  |  | Internal version row identifier. | `1000` |
| `pen_id` | `bigint` | yes | FK |  | `tmp_autmog_pens.id` (on delete cascade) | Autmog pen row this version belongs to. | `1000` |
| `source_product_id` | `text` | yes |  |  |  | Shopify product ID from Autmog. | `8383420301499` |
| `previous_details_hash` | `text` | no |  |  |  | Previous non-image product details hash. | `sha256:6a5a79355c7cd75eb8ba0837d306f002c90ff349dcb1ba04f45f69e4b7f3f6f5` |
| `next_details_hash` | `text` | yes |  |  |  | New non-image product details hash. | `sha256:5dcbd8f834f8b952cf7d8d86ed3273dd6b77cf83ea78f982096a9de7ded135fc` |
| `previous_image_set_hash` | `text` | no |  |  |  | Previous product image set hash. | `sha256:fb4c1136e5580a42246f988d3e8d18e2fc356d48fb687f6192fb797071dd55dc` |
| `next_image_set_hash` | `text` | yes |  |  |  | New product image set hash. | `sha256:711b0aab8eff464076516f1d74aedb65efe7f91a680babe4a2c9f3b0ce317fc0` |
| `snapshot` | `jsonb` | yes |  |  |  | Normalized product snapshot captured for this version. | `{"category":"pen","title":"40 Clipless Click Pen"}` |
| `change_reason` | `text` | yes |  |  |  | Reason this version row was captured. | `details_changed` |
| `captured_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | yes |  | `now()` |  | Timestamp when the version was captured. | `2026-07-17T20:45:42.000Z` |
| `replaced_at` | `timestamp with time zone` | no |  |  |  | Timestamp when this version was superseded. | `2026-07-18T20:45:42.000Z` |
